design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. High-density data layout optimized for operational clarity. Uses progressive disclosure and a modular 'Control Room' grid to manage complex support ops without cognitive overload. Color is strictly used for function (status/SLA), not decoration.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Collapsible left-sidebar with 1px right border. No background tint, purely stark white.
layout_and_spacing.container: Max-width fully fluid (100%), no boxed layout. Padding p-6 or p-8 inside main content.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid borders (border-zinc-200) extensively for tables, cards, and sections to create a rigid grid.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#00227A] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 rounded-none font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none p-4 or p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none p-4 hover:border-zinc-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer

tables.style: Dense tabular layout. text-sm. 1px bottom border per row. No alternating backgrounds. Left-align text, right-align numbers.
tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-zinc-500 font-semibold border-b-2 border-zinc-200 pb-2

badges.sla_breach: bg-red-600 text-white text-xs font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none
badges.sla_warning: bg-amber-500 text-white text-xs font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none
badges.sla_healthy: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 text-xs font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none border border-zinc-200
badges.ai_classification: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none border border-blue-200 inline-flex items-center gap-1

inputs.default: border border-zinc-300 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-[#002FA7] bg-white w-full

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text and border color changes. e.g., hover:border-zinc-400, hover:text-zinc-900.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast ring. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-1.

iconography.style: weight='regular' for standard, weight='fill' for active tabs/urgent statuses.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure strictly APCA WCAG AA standards. Text against background must have a minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject Google Fonts in the main index.html to load Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono.
Avoid Shadcn 'Cards' default roundness; override with `rounded-none` and flat shadows for the strict Swiss Brutalism look.
Build the dashboard using a collapsible left-sidebar and a top-bar dedicated to global filters (e.g., date range, team selector).
For the Agent Inbox: Use dense tables. Add SLA countdown badges using the mono font and red/amber semantic colors.
For Case Detail: Create an event timeline on the right, conversation in center, AI macro suggestions floating or pinned to bottom.
For Manager Dashboard: Use grid-cols-4 for top-line metrics (Cards), and a wide table for agent performance.
Use Recharts for Ops Leadership charts (Backlog trends, topic distribution). Apply sharp geometric designs to the charts, disabling curved lines (type='linear' not 'monotone').
Use Phosphor Icons exclusively. Ensure data-testid attributes are populated across all buttons, nav items, and stat blocks.
